fixture_notes: Fictional non-confidential mock data used only for MVP dashboard export prototype tests.
Records are not real FDA, TFDA, or ClinicalTrials.gov outputs.
All sponsor names are illustrative and not corporate-family or alias mappings.

Draft guidance status must not be interpreted as final regulatory requirement.

source_health.recommended_action: No action required; continue scheduled checks.

MVP active sources only (FDA, TFDA, ClinicalTrials.gov). EMA, NMPA, CDE, PMDA, WHO ICTRP, EU CTIS are out of phase.
